dashboard.heroSubtext: Check food safety for your profile with a quick photo scan.
dashboard.ctaScanHistorySubtitle: Browse past analyses and open details

scanHistory.loadError: Could not load the list. Check your connection and try again.
scanHistory.empty: No scans yet. Start from the home screen by scanning a photo.
scanHistory.notFound: This scan was not found or was removed.
scanHistory.detailNoBreakdown: No detailed ingredient breakdown for this record (older scan). See the raw ingredient list above.

labelScan.cameraCanceledMessage: The camera was closed before taking a photo.
labelScan.scanPickSubtitle: Take a photo of the label or choose an image from your library.
labelScan.needsConditionsSubtitle: To compare label ingredients with your profile, choose at least one medical condition or food allergy from the catalog.
labelScan.analyzingHint: Reading the label and checking against your profile…
labelScan.serverLabelAiNotConfigured: Label reading uses Gemini on the server. Set a valid GEMINI_API_KEY in backend/.env (not on the phone), then restart the backend / Docker container.

media.cameraPermissionDeniedMessage: Allow camera access in Settings to photograph labels.
media.cameraSimulatorMessage: The camera only works on a real phone. Use a USB-connected iPhone or install the app on your device to try it.
media.mediaLibraryPermissionDeniedMessage: Allow access in Settings so you can choose label images from your gallery.

onboarding.title: Your health profile
onboarding.subtitle: Select medical conditions and food allergies. Label scans are evaluated against this information.
onboarding.diseasesSheetHint: List matches your app health catalog. Tap to toggle; multiple allowed.
onboarding.allergiesSheetHint: List matches your app allergy catalog. Tap to toggle; multiple allowed.
onboarding.requiredConditionsMessage: Choose at least one medical condition or food allergy for analysis.
onboarding.backMessage: You will be signed out and can sign in again later.
onboarding.errorSave: Could not save your profile. Try again.

profile.editHealthSubtitle: Update your medical conditions and food allergies. Label analysis uses this profile.
profile.supportBody: Reach out to our support team with any questions about your data.

settings.title: Settings
settings.languageSheetHint: Tap a row to switch language.
settings.deleteMessage: Your profile, scan history, and server-side preferences will be permanently removed. This cannot be undone.
settings.deleteDisclaimer: Deleting your account is permanent and removes all stored scans and profile data.
settings.deleteSecondMessage: This will permanently delete your account and all associated data.
settings.deleteFailed: Could not delete your account. Please try again.

notifications.channelDescription: Reminders and updates from Luminous Health.
notifications.permissionRationale: We use notifications for important updates.
